data.biography: 芦芳生毕业于北京电影学院表演系，参演过《雪豹》、《永不磨灭的番号》、《长安十二时辰》等中国优秀电视连续剧。
data.name: 芦芳生

data.biography: 盧芳生畢業於北京電影學院表演系，參演過《雪豹》、《永不磨滅的番號》、《長安十二時辰》等中國優秀電視聯續劇。
data.name: 蘆芳生

data.biography:
Diarmaid Murtagh is an Irish actor. He portrayed Leif in the 2013 historical drama television series Vikings, Dimitri in Dracula Untold (2014) and Captain Harpen in The Monuments Men (2014). He first appeared in the 2007 Irish soap opera Ros na Rún. His debut film role was as Captain Harpen in the George Clooney's 2014 war film The Monuments Men. Murtagh played convict Frank Mitchell in the 2019 film The Krays' Mad Axeman.

He is currently starring in Troy: Fall of a City as Hermes, messenger of Olympus. He is currently featured as “Connor” in the Netflix sci fi drama The one.
data.name: Diarmaid Murtagh

data.biography: 迪爾梅德·默塔 是一名演員。
data.name: 迪爾梅德·默塔

data.biography: Gabriel Rosado is an American professional boxer who challenged twice for a middleweight world title in 2013. Hailing from Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, Rosado is part of the city's large Puerto Rican community.
data.name: Gabriel Rosado

data.biography: 周帅，1989年1月7日出生于江苏省徐州市，中国内地影视男演员，毕业于中央戏剧学院。
data.name: 周帅

data.biography: 周帥，1989 年 1 月 7 日出生於江蘇省徐州市，中國內地影視男演員，畢業於中央戲劇學院。
data.name: 周帥

data.biography:
Kevin Zegers (born September 19, 1984) is a Canadian-American actor. He is best known for his leading roles as Josh Framm in the Air Bud series, as well as playing Damien Dalgaard in the Gossip Girl series and the protagonist in Rock Mafias The Big Bang. On August 3rd, 2013, Zegers married Jaime Feld, an agent who was his girlfriend for several years.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Kevin Zegers , licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Kevin Zegers
